content_props.headline: A Better Process
content_props.subheadline: Ship the contract, not the chaos

slides.speaker_notes: Open with the pain everyone in the room recognizes.

content_props.left_body: Hand-written deck markup drifts from the data and breaks on every edit.
content_props.right_body: Author validated JSON; let the renderer own the styling.

slides.speaker_notes: Contrast the old way with the new way side by side.
Show how compact and reviewable the source is.

content_props.quote: The best styling is the styling you never have to write.

slides.speaker_notes: Land the thesis and invite questions.
